chatbot_logs.query: How do I approve the project?
chatbot_logs.response:
To approve this project:
1. Scroll down to the Approval Center on your project page.
2. In the Canvas Pad, draw your signature using your mouse or touch screen.
3. Type your name in the signatory field.
4. Click 'Approve Project'.
This will lock the project as completed and log your official signature.

To request revisions or changes:
1. Select the relevant version number from the dropdown menu.
2. Click 'Request Revision'.
3. Select a category (e.g., Audio, Color Grading, Editing) and write down details of the feedback.
4. You can also save a screenshot reference. Click submit to alert the editors.
